description_long: This kiosk is constructed primarily from bamboo and wood, featuring a slatted platform floor, vertical slat walls, and a prominent sloped roof made of thatch or wooden shingles. The front area includes a small counter or serving area, with a raised platform and steps leading up to it. There are several round wooden stools or seats placed in front, and a hanging circular sign or tray is attached to one side. The structure is open on the front and partially on the sides, with a rectangular window cutout in the wall behind the counter. The overall design is rustic and open, suitable for outdoor or park settings, and the materials give it a natural, handcrafted appearance.
description: A rustic bamboo and wood kiosk with a slatted platform, sloped thatched roof, open front counter, and round stools, designed for outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open counter, slatted platform, stools, and the main serving area under the sloped roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the counter, the overhanging roof, and the hanging circular sign or tray.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the slatted wall, the back of the counter, and the roof structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the steps, stools, and the underside of the sloped roof.
attribute_signage_type: hanging circular sign on left side, no visible text or symbols
attribute_window_presence: one rectangular window in rear wall, center
attribute_door_configuration: open entryway at front, no doors
attribute_roof_design: sloped roof with overhang, made of thatch or wooden shingles, supported by bamboo poles
